description_long: This object is a rectangular chalkboard advertising board with a thick wooden frame and a black writing surface. The front face displays a hand-drawn menu with white chalk text and illustrations, listing drinks and desserts, and is divided into sections with decorative lines and borders. The writing includes both hot and cold beverages, as well as a variety of desserts, all written in a playful, casual script. The back of the board is plain wood, showing a natural grain pattern with no visible writing or decoration. The board is relatively thin, as seen from the side views, and appears to be designed for wall-mounting or leaning against a surface. The overall appearance suggests it is intended for use in a café, bakery, or similar urban food establishment.
description: A rectangular chalkboard advertising board with a thick wooden frame, featuring a hand-drawn menu in white chalk on a black surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black chalkboard surface with a detailed hand-drawn menu and decorative white chalk illustrations.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the board's thin profile and the thickness of the wooden frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden surface with visible wood grain and no writing or decoration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the board and the wooden frame's edge.
attribute_frame_design: thick wooden border with visible grain and straight edges
attribute_advertisement_content: handwritten chalk menu for drinks and desserts
